case_title: WEIXIANG YUAN ET AL VS. SF DOG PARLOUR LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED AUG-01-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ AGREDANO, OFELIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-16-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFFS WEIXIANG YUAN AND JIMMY HO APPEARED. DEFENDANT SF DOG PARLOUR LLC APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY LISA RUSSELL, AND WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANTS LISA RUSSELL AND OFELIA GOMEZ AGREDANO ALSO APPEARED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SF DOG PARLOUR LLC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SF DOG PARLOUR LLC RUSSELL, LISA ANN GOMEZ AGREDANO, OFELIA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,984.29 FILED BY YUAN, WEIXIANG HO, JIMMY AS TO DEFENDANT SF DOG PARLOUR LLC RUSSELL, LISA ANN GOMEZ AGREDANO, OFELIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2025 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
